name: Bruce Anderson
currentRole: Vice President, Operations, Summit Materials, Inc
formerRole: Director of Operations, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Held a Director-level operations role at Martin Marietta Materials before transitioning to Summit Materials, bringing direct insight into MLM's quarry operations and cost structure

name: John Pfeifer
formerRole: VP and General Manager, Aggregates Division, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Served in a general management capacity within Martin Marietta's aggregates segment, providing deep familiarity with MLM's divisional P&L structure and competitive positioning

name: Michael Langford
currentRole: Senior Director, Pricing and Commercial Strategy, Vulcan Materials Company
formerRole: Director, Sales and Marketing, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Previously led sales and marketing functions at Martin Marietta Materials before joining Vulcan, making him uniquely positioned to compare competitive pricing and commercial practices across the two largest U.S. aggregates producers

name: Randall Dobbs
currentRole: Vice President, Ready Mix Concrete Operations, CEMEX USA
formerRole: Senior Manager, Downstream Products, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Held a senior management role in Martin Marietta's downstream products segment, giving direct insight into MLM's ready mix concrete and asphalt strategy before moving to CEMEX

name: Tom Hill
currentRole: Executive Vice President, Vulcan Materials Company
connectionToCompany: As a senior executive at Vulcan Materials — Martin Marietta's primary publicly traded competitor — Hill has direct insight into shared markets, pricing dynamics, and industry competitive structure relevant to MLM investors

name: Anne Noonan
currentRole: President and CEO, Summit Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: As CEO of Summit Materials, a direct competitor to Martin Marietta in key Southeast and Mountain West aggregates markets, Noonan provides perspective on competitive dynamics, pricing trends, and infrastructure demand affecting MLM

name: Kevin Dowd
currentRole: Vice President, Construction Industries, Caterpillar Inc
connectionToCompany: Caterpillar is a primary supplier of heavy equipment — including wheel loaders, haul trucks, and bulldozers — used across Martin Marietta's quarry and aggregate operations nationally

name: Scott Trumbull
currentRole: Vice President, North America Mining, Orica Limited
connectionToCompany: Orica is a leading supplier of commercial explosives and blasting services to major aggregates producers including Martin Marietta Materials, making Trumbull a key source on input cost trends and operational efficiency

name: Chris Gerner
currentRole: Senior Vice President, Procurement and Construction Services, AECOM
connectionToCompany: AECOM is a major infrastructure engineering and construction firm that procures aggregates — crushed stone, sand, and gravel — from suppliers including Martin Marietta Materials for large-scale highway, bridge, and civil infrastructure projects

name: Mike Miskovsky
currentRole: Vice President, Heavy Civil Construction, Granite Construction Incorporated
connectionToCompany: Granite Construction is a major highway and heavy civil contractor and a significant customer for aggregates produced by Martin Marietta Materials, particularly in Western and Southwestern U.S. markets where both companies are active

name: Anne H. Lloyd
currentRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
formerRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Anne Lloyd served as CFO at Martin Marietta Materials and reported directly to C. Howard Nye; she later transitioned out of the CFO role
sourceNote: SEC proxy filings and annual reports listing named executive officers

name: James A. J. Nickolas
currentRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
formerRole: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc
connectionToCompany: Nickolas joined Martin Marietta as CFO and reported directly to CEO C. Howard Nye, overseeing financial strategy and reporting
sourceNote: Martin Marietta SEC filings and press releases naming executive leadership
